source_text:
Begin Main

StartScript EnableMenus
StartScript JTT_Init
StartScript JTT_SurvivalScript
StartScript JTT_BuildCheck
StartScript JTT_FoodTracker
StartScript JTT_StatusScr
StopScript Main

End Main

Begin EnableMenus

EnableMagicMenu
EnableInventoryMenu
EnableMapMenu
EnableStatsMenu
EnableRest
set CharGenState to -1

StopScript EnableMenus

End EnableMenus

Begin JTT_Init

short Done
short Frame

if ( Done == 1 )
    StopScript JTT_Init
    return
endif

if ( Frame < 10 )
    set Frame to ( Frame + 1 )
    return
endif

Set Done to 1
Set JTT_Hunger to 0
Set JTT_Warmth to 100
Set JTT_Day to 1
Set JTT_PlayerInit to 1

player->AddItem "jtt_bone_club" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_tribal_loincloth" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_bone_torch" 1
player->AddItem "jtt_stick" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_flint" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_tinder" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_rope" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_iron_bar" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_cloth" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_spider_silk" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_bone" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_cat_fur" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_spider_venom" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_snake_venom" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_bird_feather" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_antelope_horn" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_raw_meat" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_root" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_mushroom" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_boar_hide" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_elk_hide" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_wolf_pelt" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_leather" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_fuel" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_egg" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_raw_fish" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_tortoise_shell" 10
player->AddItem "jtt_panther_fang" 10

MessageBox "B=Build, N=Quest. Explore, gather, craft, survive!"

StopScript JTT_Init

End JTT_Init

Begin JTT_SurvivalScript

float HungerTimer
float WarmthTimer
float LastDay

Set HungerTimer to ( HungerTimer + GetSecondsPassed )
Set WarmthTimer to ( WarmthTimer + GetSecondsPassed )

if ( HungerTimer >= 120 )
    Set HungerTimer to 0
    Set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger + 5 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger > 100 )
        Set JTT_Hunger to 100
    endif
    if ( JTT_Hunger >= 90 )
        MessageBox "STARVING! Find food NOW!"
        player->ModCurrentHealth -5
    else
        if ( JTT_Hunger >= 70 )
            MessageBox "You are very hungry..."
            player->ModCurrentHealth -2
        else
            if ( JTT_Hunger >= 50 )
                MessageBox "Getting hungry. Hunt or forage."
            endif
        endif
    endif
endif

if ( WarmthTimer >= 45 )
    Set WarmthTimer to 0
    if ( GameHour >= 20 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth - 8 )
    else
        if ( GameHour <= 6 )
            Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth - 8 )
        else
            if ( JTT_Warmth < 100 )
                Set JTT_Warmth to ( JTT_Warmth + 3 )
            endif
        endif
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth < 0 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 0
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth > 100 )
        Set JTT_Warmth to 100
    endif
    if ( JTT_Warmth <= 10 )
        MessageBox "FREEZING! Build a campfire!"
        player->ModCurrentHealth -5
        player->ModCurrentFatigue -20
    else
        if ( JTT_Warmth <= 30 )
            MessageBox "The cold bites deep..."
            player->ModCurrentFatigue -10
        else
            if ( JTT_Warmth <= 50 )
                MessageBox "Getting cold. Seek warmth."
            endif
        endif
    endif
endif

if ( DaysPassed > LastDay )
    Set LastDay to DaysPassed
    Set JTT_Day to ( JTT_Day + 1 )
    if ( JTT_Day == 3 )
        MessageBox "Day 3 - Ya survived 3 days! Da jungle respects ya."
    else
        if ( JTT_Day == 7 )
            MessageBox "Day 7 - A full week! Ya be a true jungle troll now."
        else
            if ( JTT_Day == 14 )
                MessageBox "Day 14 - Two weeks! Da spirits watch over ya."
            else
                MessageBox "Day %g of survival.", JTT_Day
            endif
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_SurvivalScript

Begin JTT_WorkbenchScr

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Workbench" "Rope (3 Stick)" "Hatchet (2W+2S)" "Dagger (1S+1Flint)" "Spear (3W+3S)" "Shield (3W+1S+1Bone)" "Bow (3W+1Silk)" "More..." "Close"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
            player->AddItem "jtt_rope" 1
            MessageBox "Crafted Rope!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Sticks."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_stone_hatchet" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted Stone Hatchet!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2W+2S."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2W+2S."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_flint" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 1
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_flint" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_flint_dagger" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted Flint Dagger!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1S+1Flint."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1S+1Flint."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                player->AddItem "jtt_obsidian_spear" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted Obsidian Spear!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3W+3S."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3W+3S."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 1 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bone" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 1
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_bone" 1
                    player->AddItem "jtt_bone_shield" 1
                    MessageBox "Crafted Bone Shield!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 3W+1S+1Bone."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3W+1S+1Bone."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3W+1S+1Bone."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 5 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_spider_silk" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_spider_silk" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_wooden_bow" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted Wooden Bow!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3W+1Silk."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3W+1Silk."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 6 )
        MessageBox "Workbench pg2" "Arrows (2S+1F)" "Whip (4W)" "Club (2W+2Bone)" "Pole (1W+1T+1F)" "Torch (1W+1T)" "Cloth (2Tinder)" "Back" "Close"
        set State to 2
        return
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

if ( State == 2 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bird_feather" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_bird_feather" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_stone_arrow" 10
                MessageBox "Crafted 10 Arrows!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2S+1Feather."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2S+1Feather."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 4 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 4
            player->AddItem "jtt_vine_whip" 1
            MessageBox "Crafted Vine Whip!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 4 Sticks."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bone" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_bone" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_bone_club" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted Bone Club!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2W+2Bones."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2W+2Bones."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_tinder" >= 1 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bird_feather" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 1
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_tinder" 1
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_bird_feather" 1
                    player->AddItem "jtt_fishing_pole" 1
                    MessageBox "Crafted Fishing Pole!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 1W+1T+1F."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1W+1T+1F."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1W+1T+1F."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_tinder" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 1
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_tinder" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_bone_torch" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted Torch!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1W+1T."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1W+1T."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 5 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_tinder" >= 2 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_tinder" 2
            player->AddItem "jtt_cloth" 1
            MessageBox "Crafted Cloth!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Tinder."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 6 )
        MessageBox "Workbench" "Rope (3 Stick)" "Hatchet (2W+2S)" "Dagger (1S+1Flint)" "Spear (3W+3S)" "Shield (3W+1S+1Bone)" "Bow (3W+1Silk)" "More..." "Close"
        set State to 1
        return
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_WorkbenchScr

Begin JTT_HerbNode

short HarvestCount

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( HarvestCount >= 3 )
        MessageBox "This patch is picked clean."
    else
        set HarvestCount to ( HarvestCount + 1 )
        player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 2
        player->AddItem "jtt_jungle_root" 1
        if ( HarvestCount == 1 )
            MessageBox "+2 Berries, +1 Root (2 harvests left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 2 )
            MessageBox "+2 Berries, +1 Root (1 harvest left)"
        endif
        if ( HarvestCount == 3 )
            MessageBox "+2 Berries, +1 Root (picked clean)"
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_HerbNode

Begin JTT_FastTravel

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Jungle Portal" "Base Camp" "East Jungle" "North Ridge" "West Shore" "South Marsh" "Close"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        player->PositionCell 4096 4096 20 0 ""
        PlaceAtPC "jtt_fast_travel" 1 200 1
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        player->PositionCell 12500 4000 20 0 ""
        PlaceAtPC "jtt_fast_travel" 1 200 1
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        player->PositionCell 4000 12500 20 0 ""
        PlaceAtPC "jtt_fast_travel" 1 200 1
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        player->PositionCell -4000 4000 20 0 ""
        PlaceAtPC "jtt_fast_travel" 1 200 1
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        player->PositionCell 4000 -4000 20 0 ""
        PlaceAtPC "jtt_fast_travel" 1 200 1
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_FastTravel

Begin JTT_TribalDrum

short Activated

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( Activated == 0 )
        Set Activated to 1
        MessageBox "The tribal drum strengthens your spirit!"
    else
        MessageBox "The drum still echoes."
    endif
endif

if ( Activated == 1 )
    Set Activated to 0
endif

End JTT_TribalDrum

Begin JTT_CampfireScr

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Campfire" "Cook Meat (1 Raw Meat)" "Cook Fish (1 Raw Fish)" "Make Stew (1 Cooked+1 Root+1 Berry)" "Make Omelette (2 Egg)" "Eat Berries (3 Berry)" "Warm Up" "Close"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_raw_meat" >= 1 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_raw_meat" 1
            player->AddItem "jtt_cooked_meat" 1
            set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 30 )
            if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                set JTT_Hunger to 0
            endif
            MessageBox "Cooked some meat! Hunger decreased."
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Raw Meat."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_raw_fish" >= 1 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_raw_fish" 1
            player->AddItem "jtt_cooked_fish" 1
            set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 25 )
            if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                set JTT_Hunger to 0
            endif
            MessageBox "Cooked some fish! Hunger decreased."
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Raw Fish."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_cooked_meat" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_jungle_root" >= 1 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_jungle_berry" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_cooked_meat" 1
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_jungle_root" 1
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 1
                    player->AddItem "jtt_stew" 1
                    set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 50 )
                    if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                        set JTT_Hunger to 0
                    endif
                    MessageBox "Made a Hearty Stew! Very filling!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 1 Cooked Meat, 1 Root, 1 Berry."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Cooked Meat, 1 Root, 1 Berry."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Cooked Meat, 1 Root, 1 Berry."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_egg" >= 2 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_egg" 2
            player->AddItem "jtt_omelette" 1
            set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 20 )
            if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                set JTT_Hunger to 0
            endif
            MessageBox "Made an Egg Omelette!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Eggs."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_jungle_berry" >= 3 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_jungle_berry" 3
            set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 15 )
            if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
                set JTT_Hunger to 0
            endif
            MessageBox "Ate some berries. Slightly less hungry."
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Berries."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 5 )
        set JTT_Warmth to 100
        MessageBox "Warmed up by the fire! Warmth restored."
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_CampfireScr

Begin JTT_TanneryScr

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Tannery" "Leather (1 Boar Hide)" "Leather (1 Elk Hide)" "Boar Skin Coat (2 Hide+1 Rope)" "Bear Fur Coat (2 Pelt+1 Rope)" "Cat Fur Coat (2 Fur+1 Rope)" "Leather Boots (2 Leather)" "Leather Gauntlets (2 Leather)" "Close"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_boar_hide" >= 1 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_boar_hide" 1
            player->AddItem "jtt_leather" 1
            MessageBox "Tanned a Boar Hide into Leather!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Boar Hide."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_elk_hide" >= 1 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_elk_hide" 1
            player->AddItem "jtt_leather" 1
            MessageBox "Tanned an Elk Hide into Leather!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Elk Hide."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_boar_hide" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_rope" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_boar_hide" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_rope" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_boarskin_coat" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted a Boar Skin Coat!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Boar Hides and 1 Rope."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Boar Hides and 1 Rope."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_wolf_pelt" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_rope" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_wolf_pelt" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_rope" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_bearfur_coat" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted a Bear Fur Coat!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Pelts and 1 Rope."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Pelts and 1 Rope."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_cat_fur" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_rope" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_cat_fur" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_rope" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_catfur_coat" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted a Cat Fur Coat!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Cat Furs and 1 Rope."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Cat Furs and 1 Rope."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 5 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_leather" >= 2 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_leather" 2
            player->AddItem "jtt_leather_boots" 1
            MessageBox "Crafted Leather Boots!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Leather."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 6 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_leather" >= 2 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_leather" 2
            player->AddItem "jtt_leather_gauntlets" 1
            MessageBox "Crafted Leather Gauntlets!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Leather."
        endif
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_TanneryScr

Begin JTT_ArmoryScr

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Armory" "Bone Axe (2W+2 Bone)" "Horn Spear (2W+1 Horn+1 Rope)" "Horn Dagger (1S+1 Horn)" "Iron Axe (1W+2 Iron)" "Iron Spear (2W+2 Iron)" "War Maul (3W+3S+1 Iron)" "Tortoise Shield (1 Shell+2W)" "Close"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bone" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_bone" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_bone_axe" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted a Bone Axe!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Sticks and 2 Bones."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Sticks and 2 Bones."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_antelope_horn" >= 1 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_rope" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_antelope_horn" 1
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_rope" 1
                    player->AddItem "jtt_horn_spear" 1
                    MessageBox "Crafted a Horn Spear!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 2 Sticks, 1 Horn, 1 Rope."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Sticks, 1 Horn, 1 Rope."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Sticks, 1 Horn, 1 Rope."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_antelope_horn" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 1
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_antelope_horn" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_horn_dagger" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted a Horn Dagger!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Stone and 1 Antelope Horn."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Stone and 1 Antelope Horn."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 1
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_iron_axe" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted an Iron Axe!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Stick and 2 Iron Bars."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Stick and 2 Iron Bars."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_iron_spear" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted an Iron Spear!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 2 Sticks and 2 Iron Bars."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Sticks and 2 Iron Bars."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 5 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 1
                    player->AddItem "jtt_war_maul" 1
                    MessageBox "Crafted a War Maul!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 3 Sticks, 3 Stones, 1 Iron Bar."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3 Sticks, 3 Stones, 1 Iron Bar."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Sticks, 3 Stones, 1 Iron Bar."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 6 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_tortoise_shell" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_tortoise_shell" 1
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_tortoise_shield" 1
                MessageBox "Crafted a Tortoise Shield!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Tortoise Shell and 2 Sticks."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Tortoise Shell and 2 Sticks."
        endif
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_ArmoryScr

Begin JTT_ForgeScr

short State
short Button

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( State == 0 )
        MessageBox "Forge" "Iron Bar (3 Stone + 1 Flint)" "Fuel (1 Tinder + 1 Stick)" "Iron Helm (2 Iron Bar)" "Iron Cuirass (3 Iron+1 Leather)" "Iron Arrows x10 (1 Iron+1 Feather)" "Close"
        set State to 1
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_flint" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_flint" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_iron_bar" 1
                MessageBox "Smelted an Iron Bar!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3 Stones and 1 Flint."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Stones and 1 Flint."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_tinder" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_tinder" 1
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_fuel" 1
                MessageBox "Made Fuel!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Tinder and 1 Stick."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Tinder and 1 Stick."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 2 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 2
            player->AddItem "jtt_iron_helm" 1
            MessageBox "Forged an Iron Helm!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 2 Iron Bars."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_leather" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_leather" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_iron_cuirass" 1
                MessageBox "Forged an Iron Cuirass!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3 Iron Bars and 1 Leather."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Iron Bars and 1 Leather."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 1 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bird_feather" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 1
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_bird_feather" 1
                player->AddItem "jtt_iron_arrow" 10
                MessageBox "Forged 10 Iron Arrows!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 1 Iron Bar and 1 Feather."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 1 Iron Bar and 1 Feather."
        endif
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_ForgeScr

Begin JTT_BuildCheck

short Active
short State
short Button

if ( State == 0 )
    if ( Active == 0 )
        if ( JTT_BuildMenu == 1 )
            set Active to 1
            set JTT_BuildMenu to 0
            MessageBox "Build" "Campfire (3W)" "Workbench (4W+2S)" "Portal (3W+2S)" "More..." "Close"
            set State to 1
        endif
    endif
    if ( Active == 1 )
        set Active to 0
    endif
endif

if ( State == 1 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
            PlaceAtPC "jtt_campfire" 1 200 1
            MessageBox "Built a Campfire!"
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3 Sticks."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 4 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 4
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_workbench" 1 200 1
                MessageBox "Built a Workbench!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 4W+2S."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 4W+2S."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_fast_travel" 1 200 1
                MessageBox "Built a Jungle Portal!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3W+2S."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3W+2S."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        MessageBox "Build pg2" "Troll Hut (6W+3S)" "Tannery (4W+2S+1Rope)" "Armory (5W+3S+1Iron)" "Forge (3S+3F+2W)" "Cauldron (3S+2W+1Iron)" "Voodoo (4W+2S+1Doll)" "Storage (3W+1S)" "Herb Patch" "Back" "Close"
        set State to 2
        return
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

if ( State == 2 )
    set Button to GetButtonPressed
    if ( Button == -1 )
        return
    endif
    if ( Button == 0 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 6 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 6
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_troll_hut" 1 500 1
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_hut_entrance" 1 305 1
                MessageBox "Built a Troll Hut! Use the door to enter."
            else
                MessageBox "Need 6W+3S."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 6W+3S."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 1 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 4 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_rope" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 4
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_rope" 1
                    PlaceAtPC "jtt_tannery" 1 200 1
                    MessageBox "Built a Tannery!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 4W+2S+1Rope."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 4W+2S+1Rope."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 4W+2S+1Rope."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 2 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 5 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 5
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 1
                    PlaceAtPC "jtt_armory" 1 200 1
                    MessageBox "Built an Armory!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 5W+3S+1Iron."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 5W+3S+1Iron."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 5W+3S+1Iron."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 3 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_flint" >= 3 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_flint" 3
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                    PlaceAtPC "jtt_forge" 1 200 1
                    MessageBox "Built a Forge!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 3S+3F+2W."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3S+3F+2W."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3S+3F+2W."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 4 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 2 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_bar" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 2
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_iron_bar" 1
                    PlaceAtPC "jtt_cauldron" 1 200 1
                    MessageBox "Built a Cauldron!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 3S+2W+1Iron."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3S+2W+1Iron."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3S+2W+1Iron."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 5 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 4 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 2 )
                if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_voodoo_doll" >= 1 )
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 4
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                    player->RemoveItem "jtt_voodoo_doll" 1
                    PlaceAtPC "jtt_voodoo_hut" 1 200 1
                    MessageBox "Built a Voodoo Hut!"
                else
                    MessageBox "Need 4W+2S+1Doll."
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "Need 4W+2S+1Doll."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 4W+2S+1Doll."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 6 )
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stick" >= 3 )
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_item" >= 1 )
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stick" 3
                player->RemoveItem "jtt_stone_item" 1
                PlaceAtPC "jtt_storage_chest" 1 200 1
                MessageBox "Built a Storage Chest!"
            else
                MessageBox "Need 3W+1S."
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "Need 3W+1S."
        endif
    endif
    if ( Button == 7 )
        PlaceAtPC "jtt_herb_node" 1 200 1
        MessageBox "Planted an Herb Patch!"
    endif
    if ( Button == 7 )
        MessageBox "Build" "Campfire (3W)" "Workbench (4W+2S)" "Portal (3W+2S)" "More..." "Close"
        set State to 1
        return
    endif
    set State to 0
endif

End JTT_BuildCheck

Begin JTT_StatusScr

short State

if ( State == 0 )
    if ( JTT_StatusMenu == 1 )
        set JTT_StatusMenu to 0
        MessageBox "=== SURVIVAL STATUS === Day: %g | Hunger: %g/100 | Warmth: %g/100 === Keys: B=Build F=Eat H=Status N=Quest", JTT_Day, JTT_Hunger, JTT_Warmth
    endif
endif

End JTT_StatusScr

Begin JTT_FoodTracker

short LastMeat
short LastFish
short LastStew
short LastOmelette
short LastRaw
float Timer

set Timer to ( Timer + GetSecondsPassed )
if ( Timer < 1 )
    return
endif
set Timer to 0

short CurMeat
short CurFish
short CurStew
short CurOmelette
short CurRaw

set CurMeat to ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_cooked_meat" )
set CurFish to ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_cooked_fish" )
set CurStew to ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stew" )
set CurOmelette to ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_omelette" )
set CurRaw to ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_raw_meat" )

if ( CurMeat < LastMeat )
    set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 30 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
        set JTT_Hunger to 0
    endif
    MessageBox "Ate meat. Hunger: %g", JTT_Hunger
endif

if ( CurFish < LastFish )
    set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 25 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
        set JTT_Hunger to 0
    endif
    MessageBox "Ate fish. Hunger: %g", JTT_Hunger
endif

if ( CurStew < LastStew )
    set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 50 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
        set JTT_Hunger to 0
    endif
    MessageBox "Ate stew! Hunger: %g", JTT_Hunger
endif

if ( CurOmelette < LastOmelette )
    set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 20 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
        set JTT_Hunger to 0
    endif
    MessageBox "Ate omelette. Hunger: %g", JTT_Hunger
endif

if ( CurRaw < LastRaw )
    set JTT_Hunger to ( JTT_Hunger - 10 )
    if ( JTT_Hunger < 0 )
        set JTT_Hunger to 0
    endif
    MessageBox "Ate raw meat... Hunger: %g", JTT_Hunger
endif

set LastMeat to CurMeat
set LastFish to CurFish
set LastStew to CurStew
set LastOmelette to CurOmelette
set LastRaw to CurRaw

End JTT_FoodTracker

Begin JTT_ChopTree

short HP
short Init

if ( Init == 0 )
    set HP to 3
    set Init to 1
endif

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_hatchet" >= 1 )
        set HP to ( HP - 1 )
        if ( HP <= 0 )
            player->AddItem "jtt_stick" 3
            MessageBox "Tree felled! +3 Sticks"
            Disable
        else
            MessageBox "CHOP! (%g hits left)", HP
        endif
    else
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bone_axe" >= 1 )
            set HP to ( HP - 2 )
            if ( HP <= 0 )
                player->AddItem "jtt_stick" 4
                MessageBox "Tree felled! +4 Sticks"
                Disable
            else
                MessageBox "CHOP! (%g hits left)", HP
            endif
        else
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_axe" >= 1 )
                player->AddItem "jtt_stick" 5
                MessageBox "Tree felled instantly! +5 Sticks"
                Disable
            else
                MessageBox "You need an axe to chop this tree."
            endif
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_ChopTree

Begin JTT_MineRock

short HP
short Init

if ( Init == 0 )
    set HP to 3
    set Init to 1
endif

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_hatchet" >= 1 )
        set HP to ( HP - 1 )
        if ( HP <= 0 )
            player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
            player->AddItem "jtt_flint" 1
            MessageBox "Rock broken! +3 Stone +1 Flint"
            Disable
        else
            MessageBox "CRACK! (%g hits left)", HP
        endif
    else
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_axe" >= 1 )
            set HP to ( HP - 2 )
            if ( HP <= 0 )
                player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 4
                player->AddItem "jtt_flint" 2
                MessageBox "Rock shattered! +4 Stone +2 Flint"
                Disable
            else
                MessageBox "CRACK! (%g hits left)", HP
            endif
        else
            MessageBox "You need a hatchet or axe to mine this rock."
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_MineRock

Begin JTT_MineIron

short HP
short Init

if ( Init == 0 )
    set HP to 5
    set Init to 1
endif

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_iron_axe" >= 1 )
        set HP to ( HP - 2 )
        if ( HP <= 0 )
            player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
            player->AddItem "jtt_iron_bar" 2
            MessageBox "Iron vein depleted! +2 Stone +2 Iron Bar"
            Disable
        else
            MessageBox "CLANG! (%g hits left)", HP
        endif
    else
        if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_bone_axe" >= 1 )
            set HP to ( HP - 1 )
            if ( HP <= 0 )
                player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 2
                player->AddItem "jtt_iron_bar" 1
                MessageBox "Iron vein depleted! +2 Stone +1 Iron Bar"
                Disable
            else
                MessageBox "CLANG! (%g hits left)", HP
            endif
        else
            if ( player->GetItemCount "jtt_stone_hatchet" >= 1 )
                set HP to ( HP - 1 )
                if ( HP <= 0 )
                    player->AddItem "jtt_stone_item" 3
                    MessageBox "Iron vein depleted! +3 Stone (too weak to extract iron)"
                    Disable
                else
                    MessageBox "CLANG! (%g hits left)", HP
                endif
            else
                MessageBox "You need at least a hatchet to mine iron."
            endif
        endif
    endif
endif

End JTT_MineIron

Begin JTT_EnterHut

float PX
float PY

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    set PX to ( player->GetPos x )
    set PY to ( player->GetPos y )
    set JTT_HutLastX to PX
    set JTT_HutLastY to PY
    player->PositionCell 0 -150 50 0 "Troll Hut"
    set JTT_Warmth to 100
    MessageBox "You enter the hut. Warmth restored!"
endif

End JTT_EnterHut

Begin JTT_HutExitDoor

if ( OnActivate == 1 )
    player->PositionCell JTT_HutLastX JTT_HutLastY 20 0 ""
    MessageBox "You step outside."
endif

End JTT_HutExitDoor
